searchTerms: Chou ga Tsuku Hodo no Ojousama ga, Takaga 140-en no Shakkin no Tame ni Karada wo Urou to Shite Kurun Dakedo…!
超がつくほどのお嬢様が、たかが140円の借金の為に体を売ろうとしてくるんだけど…！
A Super-Awesome Young Lady Is Willing to Sell Her Body for a Mere 140 Yen Debt but...!
